caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is positioned in a recording studio in front of a black, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring the cursive text "Stay Authentic". A silver professional microphone on a black shock mount is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as his expression shifts. In the beginning, he looks slightly to his left, then centers his gaze forward while continuing to talk. Toward the end of the clip, he glances back toward the left side of the frame. His right arm, which features a visible tattoo, rests partially in view on the left side of the scene. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body and head as he interacts with the microphone.
